bead.title: Define DDx adapter boundary after core HELIX collapse
bead.description: After the runtime-neutral core is clarified, define what remains in the DDx integration: package metadata, optional CLI wrappers, tracker mapping, execute-loop mapping, and compatibility/deprecation policy. This should absorb or re-scope existing DDx execution-contract epics rather than letting them define HELIX's product spine.
bead.acceptance: DDx integration boundary doc exists; existing DDx execution epics are either parented under this adapter work, superseded, or explicitly retained as maintenance; core HELIX docs do not depend on DDx adapter behavior.
